data.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Alert when GitHub main SHA diverges from the latest Gerrit-replicated commit (replication silently failing) (WS7 adv 5).
- [ ] Alert on out-of-band mutation/deletion of the gerrit-mirror-lock-main ruleset (drift to unprotected) (adv 6).
- [ ] Wire to the existing S5 replication alarm / CloudWatch where possible.

## Context
Post-cutover, the two new silent failure modes are replication lag and ruleset drift. From the WS7 plan review.
data.title: Replication-health + ruleset-drift alerting for the Gerrit->GitHub mirror
